scripts.version:patch: pnpm --filter @atlas-art/ui-core exec npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm --filter @atlas-art/ui-react exec npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run version:patch && pnpm run publish:core && pnpm run publish:react
scripts.publish:dry-run: pnpm run publish:core:dry && pnpm run publish:react:dry
